mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO processed_document ( processed_doc_id, file_id, file_name, file_path, type, create_time, isdelete ) VALUES ( #{processedDocument.processedDocumentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processedDocument.sourceDocumentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processedDocument.fileName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processedDocument.filePath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processedDocument.type,jdbcType=INTEGER,typeHandler=top.emilejones.hhu.pipeline.handler.ProcessedDocumentTypeHandler}, #{processedDocument.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{processedDocument.isDelete,jdbcType=INTEGER} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
file_id =#{processedDocument.sourceDocumentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, file_name = #{processedDocument.fileName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, file_path = #{processedDocument.filePath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, type =#{processedDocument.type,jdbcType=INTEGER,typeHandler=top.emilejones.hhu.pipeline.handler.ProcessedDocumentTypeHandler}, create_time = #{processedDocument.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, isdelete = #{processedDocument.isDelete,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: SELECT processed_doc_id, file_id, file_name, file_path, type, create_time, isdelete FROM processed_document WHERE processed_doc_id = #{processedDocumentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND isdelete = 1

SELECT processed_doc_id, file_id, file_name, file_path, type, create_time, isdelete FROM processed_document WHERE file_id = #{sourceDocumentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND isdelete = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC, status_type ASC, processed_doc_id DESC
